summary: Tested league matchday range bug fix and season configuration fields. Backend (6/6 tests passed): matchday range APIs return first_selectable=26, last_matchday=38; league creation validates against retroactive dates; season model includes total_matchdays and current_matchday fields. Admin UI (100%): Seasons page shows 'Giornate' and 'Giornata Attuale' columns with values 38 and 26/38; Edit modal has total_matchdays and current_matchday fields; Create League modal shows 'Range giornate disponibili: G26 → G38' with dropdowns limited to 26-38. Frontend mobile create league page shows default values (Giornata 1) when not authenticated, but backend correctly returns 26-38 range when auth token provided.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Admin UI verified, mobile requires auth which Playwright couldn't persist)

seed_data_creation: Created test leagues during testing (Test Valid G26-38 with random suffix) - can be cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All matchday range features working correctly. Season has total_matchdays=38, current_matchday=26, status=active. API /leagues/matchday-range returns first_selectable=26, last_matchday=38. Admin UI Create League modal correctly shows G26-G38 range. Backend validation rejects retroactive league creation (start_matchday < 26). Frontend mobile page works correctly when authenticated (token in AsyncStorage) - Playwright couldn't persist auth token between navigations.

backend_api_tests.GET_admin_league_matchday_range: PASS - returns first_selectable=26, last_matchday=38 for season_id
backend_api_tests.POST_leagues_valid_range_succeeds: PASS - creates league with start_matchday=26, end_matchday=38
backend_api_tests.PUT_admin_seasons_update_matchday: PASS - can update current_matchday and total_matchdays

admin_ui_tests.seasons_edit_modal: PASS - Has 'Totale Giornate' and 'Giornata Attuale' input fields
admin_ui_tests.create_league_modal_range_info: PASS - Shows 'Range giornate disponibili: G26 → G38'
admin_ui_tests.create_league_modal_dropdowns: PASS - Start/End dropdowns only show Giornata 26-38

frontend_mobile_tests.api_returns_correct_range: PASS - Backend returns first_selectable=26, last_matchday=38 when authenticated
frontend_mobile_tests.create_page_renders: PASS - Page renders with GIORNATE section and dropdowns
